items.title: Norway stuns Canada in OT, wins bronze medal
items.summary: Norway stunned Canada 3-2 in overtime of the bronze medal game to capture its first ice hockey world championship medal.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Fernandes: 'I wanted to have won more' at Man U
items.summary: Bruno Fernandes has said that he had expected to win more trophies during his time so far at Manchester United, but expressed optimism about the club's future under Michael Carr...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Odell Beckham Jr. reunites with the Giants as veteran WR inks deal with New York
items.summary: Beckham's signing comes after his second workout with the team this offseason
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
